free_text: Experimental Study and Distorted-Wave Predictions for
the (He3,alpha) Reaction on Fe Isotopes
The Los Alamos variable-energy
cyclotron.
Self-supporting target foils; areal density 1-3 mg/cm3.
Isotopic purity varied from 78-99%.
VM
BP: Updated entry, corrected title, added
doi, digitized data (unobtainable data) per an NRDC
decision for data sets that were published before 2000
(C32 of WP2022-01) for subentries 2-5, redigitized
for 6-7.
The error bars indicate the variation in
relative cross sections obtained under different
analysis procedures.
BP: Digitized data.
The error bars indicate the variation in
relative cross sections obtained under different
analysis procedures.
BP: Digitized data, discarded CPX data.
The error bars indicate the variation in
relative cross sections obtained under different
analysis procedures.
BP: Digitized data, discarded CPX data.
For all angular distributions shown in
this paper, the representative error bars on the
datum points indicate the relative cross section
errors, including statistics and background. For the
angular distributions for which no error bars are
shown, the errors are smaller than the dimensions of
the datum points. The absolute cross sections (in the
c.m. system) were determined to an accuracy of +-15%.
This error was determined from a consideration of the
uniformity of the targets and the over-all
reproducibility of the data.
